variants.name: 陷阱师
variants.ability: 始终会有两名存活玩家受困。每个夜晚*，如果没有玩家死亡，你会得知哪两名玩家受困：他们死亡。
variants.firstNightReminder: Mark 2 players with the Trapper's TRAPPED reminder.
variants.otherNightReminder: If nobody died tonight, mark the TRAPPED players with the Trapper's DEAD reminder token: They die. Wake the Trapper and notify them of who their traps killed. Put the Trapper to sleep & mark 2 new players with their TRAPPED reminder token.
variants.flavor: Walking into a bear trap, huh, Pathfinder? How careless.
